steps.title: Factor the second equation
steps.content:
Rewrite the second fraction so it uses the given ratio.
$$\frac{cx}{5y}=\frac{c}{5}\cdot\frac{x}{y}$$

steps.title: Substitute the known ratio
steps.content:
Since $\frac{x}{y}=68$, the second equation becomes
$$\frac{c}{5}\cdot 68=68$$
Divide both sides by $68$.
$$\frac{c}{5}=1$$
Then multiply by $5$. The answer is 5.
